description: Halakhic discussion, might be from a responsum, written by Samuel b. Yaaqov, the French Rabbi who was active during Abraham Maimonudes' period. It appears to address ‘my lord’ and the verso is written upside down in relation to the recto. It seems to discuss halakhic or legal issues. It mentions various rabbis, including Moses (Maimonides), Hai Gaon, Joseph Halevi (Ibn Migash) and Yeḥiel (probably Yehiel b Elyaqim.) (AA)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
